itinerary.event: Western Region SDA Youth Camp Meeting
itinerary.notes: Main afternoon choir performance. We will be ministering to over 3,000 Adventist youth from 15 districts.
Full evening concert. Bringing message of hope and the three angels' warnings through accapella and scripture readings.

A critical medical charity fundraising ministry. We are raising urgent surgery funds for Brighton, one of our own who was a victim of police brutality in 2023 and has bullets still lodged in his lungs. Come lift our brother in prayer and charitable support through acappella.
Sabbath divine service sermon accompaniment and special afternoon choral hour featuring our classical Adventist hymnal set.
Waiting final flight/logistics confirmation. Combined performance with other national Ambassador choirs.

inquiries.name: Sister Sarah Odhiambo
inquiries.subject: Inquiry about Choir Booking for Wedding
inquiries.message: Greetings in Christ. We are planning a Christian wedding on October 18th, 2026, and would love the Kachamba Chorus to minister during our ceremony. Please let us know if you are available and what the logistical requirements would be. Blessings!

music.label: Album 6
music.lyrics:
[Acapella Harmony Intro]
(Ibrahimu, Ibrahimu...
Mchukue mwanao, umpendaye sana Isaka...
Ukamtoe dhabihu...)

(Verse 1)
Siku ile Mungu alimwita Ibrahimu akasema: "Ibrahimu!"
Naye akaitika kwa upole: "Mimi hapa Bwana."
Akamwambia: "Umchukue mwanao, mwana wako wa pekee,
Isaka yule unayempenda sana, ukaende mpaka nchi ya Moria,
Ukamtoe awe dhabihu ya kuteketezwa juu ya mlima nitakaokuonyesha."

(Chorus)
Akatandika punda wake asubuhi, akachukua kuni and moto,
Akaanza safari ya utiifu, akamchukua mwanawe Isaka.
Mwanangu kumbuka, utiifu kwa Bwana ni ufunguo wa baraka,
Unapoombwa kutoa kilicho bora, usisite wala usilalamike,
Maana Mungu wetu aliye hai, kila wakati atajipatia!

(Verse 2)
Wakiwa njiani mwana Isaka akamwuliza baba yake kwa unyenyekevu:
"Baba yangu, moto upo na kuni zipo, lakini yuko wapi kondoo?"
Ibrahimu akamjibu kwa imani kuu, akasema kwa ujasiri:
"Mwanangu, Mungu atajipatia mwenyewe kondoo wa dhabihu."
Wakaendelea mbele kwa pamoja, mioyo yao ikiwa imejaa imani.

(Bridge)
Walipofika juu ya madhabahu, Ibrahimu akanyosha mkono wake,
Akatwaa kisu amtoe mwanawe dhabihu, ghafla Malaika wa Bwana akaita:
"Ibrahimu! Ibrahimu! Usinyoshe mkono wako juu ya kijana!"
Tazama! Nyuma yake kulikuwa na kondoo dume, amenaswa pembe zake kichakani,
Ibrahimu akamtoe yule kondoo badala ya Isaka!

[Outro]
Bwana atajipatia... Yehova Yire!
Utiifu wako utaleta baraka kubwa maishani mwako.
Mchukue mwanao, mchukue kila ulichonacho, umkabidhi Bwana,
Mshahara wako utakuwa mkuu mbinguni. Amina!

leaders.name: Director Brighton
leaders.bio: Guiding our pristine acappella harmonies and leading choral arrangements with deep spiritual devotion.

leaders.name: Sister Sarah Odhiambo
leaders.bio: Coordinating external invitations and wedding bookings, and managing our prayer groups and rehearsal schedules.

leaders.name: Elder Samuel Omwamba
leaders.bio: Spiritual advisor delegated by the Local Church Board, overseeing our outreach logistics and uniform supplies.
